zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Beville於1379年出生在英國波克夏武爾斯東時，她的父親Sir John Beville Sheriff of Cornwall30歲，母親Margaret De Collaton 1 Wife22歲。她於1404年與Sir Edward De La Pomeroy在英國英格蘭多瑟特比阿明斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1461年9月10日在英國戴文貝里 波梅洛易享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Beville于1379年出生在英国波克夏武爾斯東时，她的父亲Sir John Beville Sheriff of Cornwall30岁，母亲Margaret De Collaton 1 Wife22岁。她于1404年与Sir Edward De La Pomeroy在英国英格兰多瑟特比阿明斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1461年9月10日在英国戴文貝里 波梅洛易享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex and Surrey; of Norman origin): variant of   Bovill  . Derivation from Beuville (Calvados) is also possible, though unproven.

French (also Béville): habitational name from Béville (Moselle) or Béville-le-Comte (Eure-et-Loir), or a variant of Beuville, a habitational name from Beuville (Calvados). The surname Béville is rare in France.

variants.name: Bevill
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beville  .

variants.name: Bovill
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy whose medieval forms share a similar range of variants, such as Bouville (Seine-Maritime), any of several places called Biéville (Calvados, Manche) or Biville (Manche, Seine-Maritime), Beuzeville-la-Giffard (Seine-Maritime), Boiville (Orne), and perhaps Boudeville (Seine-Maritime). See also   Boswell   and   Beville  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Beville was born in 1379, in Woolstone, Berkshire, England, her father, Sir John Beville Sheriff of Cornwall, was 30 and her mother, Margaret De Collaton 1 Wife, was 22. She married Sir Edward De La Pomeroy in 1404, in Beaminster, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 10 September 1461, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Beville est née en 1379, à Woolstone, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Beville Sheriff of Cornwall, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Collaton 1 Wife, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edward De La Pomeroy en 1404, à Beaminster, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1461, à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Beville 1379 in Woolstone, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Beville Sheriff of Cornwall 30 und ihre Mutter Margaret De Collaton 1 Wife 22. Sie hat 1404 in Beaminster, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Sir Edward De La Pomeroy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. September 1461 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Beville è nata il nel 1379 nel Woolstone, Berkshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Beville Sheriff of Cornwall, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Margaret De Collaton 1 Wife, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edward De La Pomeroy nel 1404, nel Beaminster, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 settembre 1461, nel Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Bevilleが1379年にイギリスバークシュアイアウルストーンで生まれた時，父Sir John Beville Sheriff of Cornwallは30歳，母Margaret De Collaton 1 Wifeは22歳であった。1404年にイギリスイギリスドールセトビーミンスターでSir Edward De La Pomeroyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1461年9月10日にイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Beville(이)가 1379년 영국 버크실르 보스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Beville Sheriff of Cornwall(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret De Collaton 1 Wife(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브이민스터에서 Sir Edward De La Pomeroy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1461년 9월 10일 영국 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Beville nasceu em 1379, em Woolstone, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Beville Sheriff of Cornwall, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Collaton 1 Wife, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edward De La Pomeroy em 1404, em Beaminster, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1461, em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Beville родилась в 1379 г. в местности вулстоун, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Beville Sheriff of Cornwall было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Collaton 1 Wife, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edward De La Pomeroy в 1404 г. в местности биминстир, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 сентября 1461 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Beville nació en 1379, en Woolstone, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Beville Sheriff of Cornwall, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret De Collaton 1 Wife, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Edward De La Pomeroy en 1404, en Beaminster, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1461, en Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años.
